title: Red Hat Bug Fix Advisory: open-vm-tools bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for open-vm-tools is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.
description: The Open Virtual Machine Tools are the open source implementation of the VMware Tools. They are a set of guest operating system virtualization components that enhance performance and user experience of virtual machines.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): Cloud-init receives TERM signal from PID 1 in the middle of running user data [rhel-10.1.z] (JIRA:RHEL-114958)
affected_products: Red Hat Enterprise Linux for ARM 64
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for x86_64 10 x86_64
full_text:
An update for open-vm-tools is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

The Open Virtual Machine Tools are the open source implementation of the VMware Tools. They are a set of guest operating system virtualization components that enhance performance and user experience of virtual machines.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): Cloud-init receives TERM signal from PID 1 in the middle of running user data [rhel-10.1.z] (JIRA:RHEL-114958)
